title: Prometheus Announces Breakthrough e-Kerosene Pathway to Make Cost-Competitive SAF and Diesel from Electricity and Air
content: Prometheus Fuels has announced a revolutionary electrochemical process to produce synthetic paraffinic kerosene (the basis for SAF jet fuel and e-diesel) directly from atmospheric COâ‚‚ and renewable electricity, eliminating hydrogen and making Fischer-Tropsch obsolete. Operating at ambient temperature and pressure, the process uses low-cost equipment and intermittent off-grid solar power, reducing production costs by over 80%. The breakthrough enables carbon-neutral fuels that compete economically with oil-based fuels, offering scalable solutions for energy independence, defense logistics, and data centers. Two independent engineering reviews validated the technology at commercial scale.
author: Analysts Account
